name: waxframe-professional
description: WaxFrame Professional — manifest of vendored front-end library versions, declared ONLY so GitHub Dependabot can watch them for security advisories. WaxFrame is a vanilla HTML/CSS/JS app with NO build step and NO npm install in its workflow; the libraries in lib/ are self-hosted minified files. This file installs and bundles nothing. Do not add a build pipeline on the strength of its existence.
